---
title: "PRO total model diagnostic"
author: "Congyu Zhang"
output: html_document
---
# 1. Load packages and set up environment

```{r setup, include=FALSE, echo=FALSE}
rm(list=ls())

library(ggforce)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(ggsci)
library(here)
library(patchwork)

```

# 2. Obs vs IPRD and Individual Plots

```{r, echo=FALSE}
pred <- read.table(here("data", "PROtotal_data","tables.txt"),sep = ",",
                   comment.char = "",
                   header = T)

prm_beta <- read.table(here("data", "PROtotal_data","individual_prm.txt"),
                       sep = ",",comment.char = "", header = T) %>%
                select(id,contains("mode")) %>% 
                rename_with(~gsub("_mode$", "", .), contains("mode")) %>%
                #remove beta regression parameters
                select(-tau,-gamma0,-gamma1)

# load data
dat <- read.csv(here("data", "PROtotal_data","LOCF_train.csv"), header=T)

### Obs vs IPRED
ipred <- pred %>% select(id, time, PROipred_mode) 
obs <- dat %>% select(PTID, TAFR, SCORE ) %>% rename(id = PTID, time=TAFR)
ipred2 <- merge(ipred, obs, by=c('id','time'))

p1 <- ggplot(data = ipred2, aes(x = PROipred_mode, y = SCORE))+
  geom_point(color='steelblue', alpha=0.5)+
  geom_abline(slope=1, intercept = 0, color ='black',size=1.5, linetype='dashed')+
  labs(y = 'Observations',x='Individual Predictions')+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size=20),
    axis.text = element_text(size=15, color = "black"),
    legend.position = "none"
  )+
  scale_y_continuous(limits=c(0, 60))+
  scale_x_continuous(limits=c(0, 60))

print(p1)

```

# 3. Individual Plot 
sample 14 patient randomly

```{r, echo=FALSE}
set.seed(123)
random.id <- sample(unique(ipred2$id),16,replace = FALSE)

label_data <- prm_beta %>%
  filter(id %in% random.id) %>%
  mutate(label = paste0(
    "BASEP: ", round(BASEP, 2), "\n",
    "Emax: ",  round(Emax,  2), "\n",
    "Kd: ",   round(Kd,    4), "\n",
    "SLP: ",  round(SLP,   2)
  ))

ipred_plot <- ipred2 %>%
              filter(id %in% random.id)

p <- ggplot(data = ipred_plot) +
  geom_line(aes(x = time, y = PROipred_mode, color = 'IPRED'), size = 1) +
  geom_point(aes(x = time, y = SCORE, color = 'OBS'),size = 1.2,alpha =1) +
  geom_text(data = label_data,
            aes(x = Inf, y = Inf, label = label),
            hjust = 1.1,       
            vjust = 1.1,       
            size  = 4.5,
            lineheight = 0.8, 
            color = 'black',
            inherit.aes = FALSE) +

  facet_wrap_paginate(~ id,
                      ncol = 7, nrow = 2,
                      page = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(
    name   = "",
    values = c('IPRED' = '#4472C4', 'OBS' = '#C0504D'),
    labels = c('IPRED' = 'Individual Prediction', 'OBS' = 'Observed')
  ) +
  labs(x = "Time (days)", y = "PRO Total Score") +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 60)) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 400)) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.title       = element_text(size = 14,face = "bold"),
    axis.text        = element_text(size = 14, color = "black"),
    strip.text       = element_text(size = 15, face = 'bold'),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "lightgray"),
    legend.position  = 'top',
    legend.text      = element_text(size = 15),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

print(p)

ggsave("plot/figure2h.tiff",
       plot = p,
       width = 16,
       height = 6,
       units = "in",
       dpi = 300)

```

# 3. Forest Plot for Covariate Analysis 
Compare the BASEP within each covariate groups (ECOG and SEX)

```{r, echo=FALSE}
dat <- read.csv(here("data", "PROtotal_data","simulation","simulation_PRO_score.txt")) %>%
           filter(time == 0) %>%
           select(-id,-time) %>%
           mutate(group = if_else(group == "SEX2", "Female", group)) %>%
           mutate(group = if_else(group == "ECOG2", "ECOG2/3", group))

# calculate ratio to ref in each replicate
ref_means <- dat %>%
  filter(group == "Ref") %>%
  select(rep, ref_score = PRO_score)

ratios <- dat %>%
  filter(group != "Ref") %>%
  left_join(ref_means, by = "rep") %>%
  mutate(ratio = PRO_score / ref_score)

plot_data <- ratios %>%
  mutate(covariate = case_when(
    group == "Female"~ "Sex",
    group %in% c("ECOG1", "ECOG2/3") ~ "ECOG")) %>%
  group_by(covariate, group) %>%
  # 90% CI
  summarise(
    median = median(ratio),
    lower  = quantile(ratio, 0.05),
    upper  = quantile(ratio, 0.95),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    label_stats = sprintf("%.2f [%.2f-%.2f]", median, lower, upper),
    label = paste0(group, "\n", label_stats)
  )

# add the reference line for each covariate
ref_rows <- tibble(
  covariate   = c("Sex","ECOG"),
  group       = c("Male","ECOG0"),
  median      = 1,
  lower       = 1,
  upper       = 1,
  label       = c("Male \n 1.00 (ref)",
                  "ECOG0 \n 1.00 (ref)")
)

# combine reference with previous data frame and set factor levels
plot_data <- bind_rows(plot_data, ref_rows) %>%
  mutate(
    sort_order = case_when(
      group == "ECOG0"  ~ 1,
      group == "ECOG1"  ~ 2,
      group == "ECOG2/3"  ~ 3,
      group == "Male"   ~ 1,
      group == "Female" ~ 2
    )
  ) %>%
  arrange(covariate, sort_order) %>%
  mutate(label = factor(label, levels = rev(unique(label))))

cov_forest <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = median, y = label)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = lower, xmax = upper),
                 height = 0.2, linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  facet_wrap(~ covariate, ncol = 1, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(x = "Relative Baseline PRO Total Score", y = "") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    plot.margin      = margin(r = 1, unit = "pt"),
    axis.text        = element_text(size = 14.5, color = "black"),
    axis.title       = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
    strip.text       = element_text(size = 14.5, face = "bold"),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "lightgray", color = NA)
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0.5, 3.5, 0.5), limits = c(0.5, 3.5))

print(cov_forest)

ggsave("plot/figure2e.tiff",
       plot = cov_forest,
       width = 7,
       height = 4.5,
       units = "in",
       dpi = 300)

```

# 4. VPC 
## 4.1 PRO total Training Model

```{r, echo=FALSE}
rm(list=ls())

#=====================================================================================
# Function to generate the data for VPC
#=====================================================================================
draw_vpc_categorical <- function(project.name, simdata) {
  
  # Read empirical distribution data
  empirical <- read.csv(here("data", "PROtotal_data",
                             paste0(project.name, "/ChartsData/VisualPredictiveCheck/PRO_score_distribution.txt")),
                        header = TRUE)
  
  # Extract bin edges from empirical data
  bins       <- sort(unique(c(empirical$binsTimeBefore, empirical$binsTimeAfter)))
  binsmiddle <- (bins[-1] + bins[-length(bins)]) / 2
  
  # Assign simulated data to bins
  simdata$binindex <- findInterval(simdata$time, bins, all.inside = TRUE)
  
  # Define the function for different beta regression category
  # category [0-9]  : sim_PRO >= 0  & sim_PRO <= 9
  # category [10-51]: sim_PRO >= 10 & sim_PRO <= 51
  cat_labels <- c("[0-9]", "[10-51]")
  cat_funs   <- list(
    "[0-9]"   = function(x) x >= 0  & x <= 9,
    "[10-51]" = function(x) x >= 10 & x <= 51
  )
  
  # Calculate proportions for each category in each bin for each replicate
  pred_list <- list()
  
  for (cat in cat_labels) {
    prop_cat <- aggregate(
      cat_funs[[cat]](simdata$sim_PRO),
      by  = list(bin = simdata$binindex, rep = simdata$rep),
      FUN = mean
    )
    names(prop_cat)[3] <- "proportion"
    
    pred_lower  <- aggregate(proportion ~ bin, data = prop_cat, FUN = function(x) quantile(x, 0.025))
    pred_median <- aggregate(proportion ~ bin, data = prop_cat, FUN = function(x) quantile(x, 0.500))
    pred_upper  <- aggregate(proportion ~ bin, data = prop_cat, FUN = function(x) quantile(x, 0.975))
    
    pred_intervals <- data.frame(
      bin        = pred_lower$bin,
      bin_middle = binsmiddle[pred_lower$bin],
      lower      = pred_lower$proportion,
      median     = pred_median$proportion,
      upper      = pred_upper$proportion,
      category   = cat
    )
    
    pred_list[[cat]] <- pred_intervals
  }
  
  pred_all <- do.call(rbind, pred_list)
  
  # Calculate each category percentage for empirical data  
  empirical_clean <- empirical %>%
    mutate(bin_middle = (binsTimeBefore + binsTimeAfter) / 2) %>%
    select(bin_middle, category, propCategory_empirical)
  
  # Return data frame for plotting
  vpc_data <- pred_all %>%
    left_join(empirical_clean, by = c("bin_middle", "category"))
  
  return(vpc_data)
}

#===============================================================================
# VPC as in Monolix: the same observation times as in the data set are used
# whatever the new simulated dropout (death) time is
#===============================================================================
project.name <- "TTE_final"

simdata <- read.csv(here("data","PROtotal_data",
                         paste0(project.name, "/ChartsData/VisualPredictiveCheck/PRO_score_simulations.txt")), header = TRUE)

vpc_basic <- draw_vpc_categorical(project.name, simdata)

p1 <- ggplot(vpc_basic, aes(x = bin_middle)) +
  
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper, fill = category),
              alpha = 0.5) +
  
  geom_line(aes(y = median, color = category),
            linewidth = 1, linetype = "dashed") +
  
  geom_line(aes(y = propCategory_empirical, color = category),
            linewidth = 1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ category,labeller = labeller(category = c("[0-9]"   = "Score 0–9",
                                              "[10-51]" = "Score 10–51"))) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1)) +
  
  scale_color_manual(values = c("[0-9]"   = "royalblue4",
                                "[10-51]" = "royalblue4")) +
  scale_fill_manual( values = c("[0-9]"   = "grey60",
                                "[10-51]" = "grey60")) +
  
  labs(x = "Time (days)", y = "Proportion") +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 400)) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    legend.position  = "none",
    axis.text.x = element_text(hjust = 1, size = 14, color = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14, color = "black"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 14),
    strip.text  = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15)
  )
print(p1)

```
```{r}
#===============================================================================
# VPC with removal of observation points happening after dropout
#===============================================================================
sim_survival <- read.csv(here("data","PROtotal_data",paste0(project.name, 
                     "/ChartsData/VisualPredictiveCheck/survival_simulations.txt")), header = TRUE) %>%
                select(rep,ID,time)

dropouttable <- sim_survival[seq(2, nrow(sim_survival), by = 2), 1:3]
colnames(dropouttable)[3] <- "dropouttime"

simdata_OS <- merge(x=simdata,y=dropouttable,by=c("ID","rep"))
simdata_OS <- simdata_OS[simdata_OS$time < simdata_OS$dropouttime, ] 

vpc_dropout <- draw_vpc_categorical(project.name, simdata_OS)

p2 <- ggplot(vpc_dropout, aes(x = bin_middle)) +
  
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper, fill = category),alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_line(aes(y = propCategory_empirical, color = category),linewidth = 1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ category,labeller = labeller(category = c("[0-9]"   = "Score 0–9",
                                                         "[10-51]" = "Score 10–51"))) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1)) +
  
  scale_color_manual(values = c("[0-9]"   = "royalblue4",
                                "[10-51]" = "royalblue4")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("[0-9]"   = "grey60",
                                "[10-51]" = "grey60")) +
  
  labs(x = "Time (days)", y = "Proportion") +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 400)) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    legend.position  = "none",
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 15, color = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15, color = "black"),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15),
    strip.text  = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15)
  )

print(p2)

ggsave("plot/figure2c.tiff",
       plot = p2,
       width = 7.5,
       height = 3.5,
       units = "in",
       dpi = 300)


```

## 4.2 PRO total Validation Model
```{r}
#=====================================================================================
# Function to generate the data for VPC
#=====================================================================================
draw_vpc_categorical <- function(project.name, simdata) {
  
  # Read empirical distribution data
  empirical <- read.csv(here("data", "PROtotal_data",
                             paste0(project.name, "/ChartsData/VisualPredictiveCheck/PRO_score_distribution.txt")),
                        header = TRUE)
  
  # Extract bin edges from empirical data
  bins       <- sort(unique(c(empirical$binsTimeBefore, empirical$binsTimeAfter)))
  binsmiddle <- (bins[-1] + bins[-length(bins)]) / 2
  
  # Assign simulated data to bins
  simdata$binindex <- findInterval(simdata$time, bins, all.inside = TRUE)
  
  # Define the function for different beta regression category
  # category [0-11]  : sim_PRO >= 0  & sim_PRO <= 11
  # category [12-47]: sim_PRO >= 12 & sim_PRO <= 47
  cat_labels <- c("[0-11]", "[12-47]")
  cat_funs   <- list(
    "[0-11]"   = function(x) x >= 0  & x <= 11,
    "[12-47]" = function(x) x >= 12 & x <= 47
  )
  
  # Calculate proportions for each category in each bin for each replicate
  pred_list <- list()
  
  for (cat in cat_labels) {
    prop_cat <- aggregate(
      cat_funs[[cat]](simdata$sim_PRO),
      by  = list(bin = simdata$binindex, rep = simdata$rep),
      FUN = mean
    )
    names(prop_cat)[3] <- "proportion"
    
    pred_lower  <- aggregate(proportion ~ bin, data = prop_cat, FUN = function(x) quantile(x, 0.025))
    pred_median <- aggregate(proportion ~ bin, data = prop_cat, FUN = function(x) quantile(x, 0.500))
    pred_upper  <- aggregate(proportion ~ bin, data = prop_cat, FUN = function(x) quantile(x, 0.975))
    
    pred_intervals <- data.frame(
      bin        = pred_lower$bin,
      bin_middle = binsmiddle[pred_lower$bin],
      lower      = pred_lower$proportion,
      median     = pred_median$proportion,
      upper      = pred_upper$proportion,
      category   = cat
    )
    
    pred_list[[cat]] <- pred_intervals
  }
  
  pred_all <- do.call(rbind, pred_list)
  
  # Calculate each category percentage for empirical data  
  empirical_clean <- empirical %>%
    mutate(bin_middle = (binsTimeBefore + binsTimeAfter) / 2) %>%
    select(bin_middle, category, propCategory_empirical)
  
  # Return data frame for plotting
  vpc_data <- pred_all %>%
    left_join(empirical_clean, by = c("bin_middle", "category"))
  
  return(vpc_data)
}

#===============================================================================
# VPC as in Monolix: the same observation times as in the data set are used
# whatever the new simulated dropout (death) time is
#===============================================================================
project.name <- "TTE_validation"

simdata <- read.csv(here("data","PROtotal_data",
                         paste0(project.name, "/ChartsData/VisualPredictiveCheck/PRO_score_simulations.txt")), header = TRUE)

vpc_basic <- draw_vpc_categorical(project.name, simdata)

p1 <- ggplot(vpc_basic, aes(x = bin_middle)) +
  
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper, fill = category),
              alpha = 0.5) +
  
  geom_line(aes(y = median, color = category),
            linewidth = 1, linetype = "dashed") +
  
  geom_line(aes(y = propCategory_empirical, color = category),
            linewidth = 1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ category,labeller = labeller(category = c("[0-11]"   = "Score 0–11",
                                                         "[12-47]" = "Score 12–47"))) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1)) +
  
  scale_color_manual(values = c("[0-11]"   = "royalblue4",
                                "[12-47]" = "royalblue4")) +
  scale_fill_manual( values = c("[0-11]"   = "grey60",
                                "[12-47]" = "grey60")) +
  
  labs(x = "Time (days)", y = "Proportion") +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 400)) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    legend.position  = "none",
    axis.text.x = element_text(hjust = 1, size = 14, color = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14, color = "black"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 14),
    strip.text  = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15)
  )
print(p1)

```

```{r}
#===============================================================================
# VPC with removal of observation points happening after dropout
#===============================================================================
sim_survival <- read.csv(here("data","PROtotal_data",paste0(project.name, 
                            "/ChartsData/VisualPredictiveCheck/survival_simulations.txt")), header = TRUE) %>%
                select(rep,ID,time)

dropouttable <- sim_survival[seq(2, nrow(sim_survival), by = 2), 1:3]
colnames(dropouttable)[3] <- "dropouttime"

simdata_OS <- merge(x=simdata,y=dropouttable,by=c("ID","rep"))
simdata_OS <- simdata_OS[simdata_OS$time < simdata_OS$dropouttime, ] 

vpc_dropout <- draw_vpc_categorical(project.name, simdata_OS)

p2 <- ggplot(vpc_dropout, aes(x = bin_middle)) +
  
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper, fill = category),alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_line(aes(y = propCategory_empirical, color = category),linewidth = 1) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ category,labeller = labeller(category = c("[0-11]"   = "Score 0–11",
                                                         "[12-47]" = "Score 12–47"))) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1)) +
  
  scale_color_manual(values = c("[0-11]"   = "royalblue4",
                                "[12-47]" = "royalblue4")) +
  scale_fill_manual( values = c("[0-11]"   = "lightskyblue",
                                "[12-47]" = "lightskyblue")) +
  
  labs(x = "Time (days)", y = "Proportion") +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 400)) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    legend.position  = "none",
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 15, color = "black"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15, color = "black"),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15),
    strip.text  = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15)
  )

print(p2)

ggsave("plot/figure2d.tiff",
       plot = p2,
       width = 7.5,
       height = 3.5,
       units = "in",
       dpi = 300)
```
